policyName: Zava Business Pack — SME Property & Interruption (PDS v5.0)
summary: Bundled cover for small-to-medium businesses combining building (or tenant improvements), contents & stock, business interruption, money, glass, and theft sections. Standard indemnity period 12 months for business interruption with optional extensions to 18 or 24 months.
coverage: Property damage (building, contents, stock) on a replacement basis. Business interruption: gross profit, increased cost of working, additional increase in cost of working, payroll, claim preparation costs ($25,000). Theft & money: cash on premises and in transit ($5,000 base, optional uplift). Glass: external glass and signage. Public & products liability: $20m. Tax audit add-on, machinery breakdown add-on, and cyber-event add-on available.
exclusions: Wear and tear and gradual deterioration; loss of market or customer goodwill; consequential loss not covered by the BI section; war, terrorism (unless add-on selected); loss caused by computer viruses (unless cyber add-on); loss while premises are unoccupied for >30 consecutive days; pollution gradually discharged.
evidenceRequired: Stock & asset register at time of loss
BAS and tax returns for the prior 24 months for BI calculation
Forensic accountant report for BI claims >$100,000
Fire & Rescue / police reports for fire or theft
Photos and supplier invoices for damaged stock
Indicative scope of works from licensed builder
